name: Ballou Park Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Ballou Park Tennis Courts in Danville, VA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: City Armory Recreation Center
description: City Armory Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Danville, VA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Danville Family YMCA
description: Danville Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Danville, VA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Glenwood Community Center
description: Glenwood Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Danville, VA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Mt. Hermon Baptist Church
description: Mt. Hermon Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Danville, VA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.

name: O. T. Bonner Middle School
description: O. T. Bonner Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Danville, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Riveroak Church
description: Come play pickleball at Riveroak Church in Danville, VA! There is 1 indoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The court is private.
